_meta.title: Qatar Innovation Ecosystem Channels — Reference Inventory
_meta.description: Structured inventory of research-funding mechanisms, innovation programs, procurement channels, and research-commissioning entities active in Qatar as of May 2026. Each entry includes the canonical URL, category, access type, and contextual notes.
_meta.scope: Public-facing channel descriptions. Not a personal opportunity list — see ECOSYSTEM_LANDSCAPE.md for the analytical synthesis.

categories.research_commissioning: Entities that directly commission research outputs

channels.notes: 248 live tenders typical. Vendor registration plus MOF classification certificate required for bid submission. Bid-bond exemption available for consultancy / research / services below QAR 500,000.

channels.description: QF tenders cross-list to Monaqasat; separate registration required for QF-bid eligibility

channels.entity: Qatar Airways Group eSourcing (covers MATAR / Hamad International Airport)
channels.description: Airline and airport group procurement; iSupplier portal with 33 mandatory registration fields

channels.entity: QRDI — Qatar Research, Development and Innovation Council
channels.notes: Operates ARP, NRP, RTP plus strategic calls (AIQAT, Agentic AI, PPM). Most calls require Lead Principal Investigator institutional affiliation.

channels.description: Joint QRDI + MCIT AI research grant
channels.notes: Up to QAR 1M / 2 years. Submission deadline 11 March 2026. Institutional affiliation + terminal degree required.
Up to QAR 300,000 / 12 months. Submission deadline 26 February 2026. Institutional affiliation required.
Up to QAR 800,000 / year for up to 3 years. PhD + institutional affiliation.
Multiple programs: XLR8 accelerator, Incubate, Tech Venture Fund, sector accelerators (WaterTech with TotalEnergies, FemTech with Merck), Stars of Science.
Cycle 15 ran in 2025. Open to teams up to 5; must be Qatar residents; pre-company stage.
Pre-Acceleration and Incubator programs. Incubator package value ~USD 250k including ~USD 40k cash investment.

channels.entity: QDB / Invest Qatar — Startup Qatar Investment Program
channels.description: Equity-and-grant program with licensing and visa support
channels.notes: START up to USD 1.1M; GROW up to USD 5.5M. Priority sectors include AI/ML, FinTech, HealthTech.
QAR 25,000 Pre-Investment Award per 2025 cycle. Themes typically span AI/ML, AR, blockchain, IoT, quantum.

channels.description: Multi-week televised inventor competition for Arab innovators
channels.notes: 12-week format; substantial cash prize for season winner.
USD 5,000 incorporation. 2-week processing for individual entity. FinTech APIs, cybersecurity for FinTech, cloud-for-FinTech, and DLT explicitly permitted.
Two tracks: regular Sandbox and fast-track Express Sandbox. Recent approvals: TrustIn (Digital Escrow, July 2025), Paywise/Dibsy (Open Banking, July 2025).

channels.description: Smart-city vendor accreditation for 107 digital use cases
channels.notes: QAR 6B 5-year program across transport, logistics, environment, healthcare, sports. Accreditation chain typically 4-8 months.

channels.description: Sector studies and reports (e.g., Qatar Islamic Finance Report 2025)

channels.entity: Qatar Centre for Global Banking and Finance (KCL partnership)

channels.description: Arabic NLP, cybersecurity, data analytics research collaborations

channels.entity: Social and Economic Survey Research Institute (SESRI) — Qatar University
Arab Center for Research and Policy Studies (Doha Institute) — Hikama Journal
channels.description: Public administration and policy research; periodic special-issue calls

channels.entity: Gulf Studies Center (Qatar University) — Gulf Insights and Policy Briefs
channels.description: Politics, security, energy, and economics research on the Gulf region

channels.entity: UNESCO Doha Office (Cluster Office for Gulf States and Yemen)
channels.description: Individual consultancies for sector studies, frameworks, evaluations
channels.notes: Posted Terms of Reference. Doha-based individual consultancies appear sporadically.

channels.entity: Qatar Open Data Portal (Planning and Statistics Authority)
channels.description: Open datasets on population, prices, commerce, environment, energy, vehicle registration
